utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). In the final package, all 7 items are present. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) destination: provided (Lisbon, Portugal) – sufficient. 2) travel_dates: provided (October 5th - 9th, 2024) – specific dates, but note user requested after Bali retreat in October; still counts as specified. 3) transportation: includes type (Flight), details (Budget Airlines, Economy Class) and cost (€100 round trip) – however no specific flight numbers/times; the format only requires flight details with costs, which are present albeit generic, so acceptable. 4) accommodation: name, room type, and cost (€275 for 5 nights) – but dates are 5th-9th which is 4 nights; also hotel cost says 5 nights; despite inconsistency, the item has hotel selection with costs specified, so counts as included. 5) activities: list with names and costs – included. 6) additional_services: dining with cost – included. 7) total_budget: provided as €610 – but no detailed breakdown beyond line items; still a total is given. All items are present and specified with costs where required. Therefore 7/7.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes a destination (Lisbon, Portugal), transportation type (Budget Airlines, Economy Class), accommodation (Adventure Lodge), and activities (City Walking Tour, Yoga Retreat, Street Art Tour).
